classObjective: Apply the Segment Addition Postulate to find missing segment lengths.
workedExamples: 10-3, Example 3 — Apply the Segment Addition Postulate Algebraically
10-3, Example 4 — Solve Real-World Problems Using Segment Addition
warmUp: If AB = 5 and BC = 8, what is AC if B is between A and C?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: Segment Addition Postulate (if B is between A and C, then AB + BC = AC); setting up equations; real-world applications
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice applying Segment Addition Postulate to find missing lengths
independentPractice: Practice problems applying segment addition to find unknown lengths and solve real-world problems
assessment: Exit ticket: if AC = 15 and AB = 6, find BC when B is between A and C
capReflection: How does the Segment Addition Postulate extend the idea of measuring distance on a number line to points that are between other points?
